name: Fast Cash Pawn
description_short: FirstCash is the leading international pawn shop operator with 3,300+ locations across the U.S., UK, and Latin America, offering pawn loans, retail sales, and gold buying services.
description_long:
FirstCash, Inc. is headquartered in Fort Worth, Texas and operates as the leading international pawn shop chain with more than 3,300 retail locations across 29 U.S. states, Washington D.C., the United Kingdom, and Latin America (including Mexico, Guatemala, Colombia, and El Salvador). The company employs approximately 22,000 people and is publicly traded as a component of both the S&P MidCap 400 Index and Russell 2000 Index.

FirstCash provides pawn loans secured by pledged personal property as its core lending product, serving cash and credit-constrained consumers. The company buys and sells a wide variety of merchandise including jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, and musical instruments. Additional services include gold/precious metal buying, layaway plans with 10% down payment options, and retail merchandise sales through their physical store network.

The company distinguishes itself through its massive retail footprint—over 2,500 stores across North and Latin America—and its additional subsidiary AFF, which provides lease-to-own and retail finance payment solutions through 15,000+ merchant partner locations. This dual business model allows FirstCash to serve a broader segment of credit-constrained consumers beyond traditional pawn services.

As a large, publicly traded corporation, FirstCash offers institutional stability and consistent operational standards across locations. However, pawn loans remain a high-cost borrowing option compared to traditional lending, and the company's primary value proposition is rapid liquidity against personal property rather than credit-building or long-term financial solutions.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Massive geographic footprint with 3,300+ locations makes finding a nearby store convenient
Non-recourse pawn loans mean no personal liability beyond loss of collateral
Immediate cash on the spot for items sold or pawned
No credit check required for pawn loans—accessible to credit-constrained consumers
Wide variety of merchandise accepted (jewelry, electronics, tools, instruments, etc.)
Layaway service available with affordable 10% down payment option
Publicly traded company with institutional stability and regulatory oversight
cons: Pawn loans carry high interest rates typical of the industry—significantly more expensive than traditional personal loans
Risk of losing valuable personal property if loan cannot be repaid
Limited to short-term liquidity solutions rather than addressing underlying financial or credit issues
Retail merchandise prices typically above market value for items purchased from pawn shops
No credit-building benefit—pawn activity does not improve credit scores
best_for: Consumers needing immediate cash who own valuable personal property (jewelry, electronics, instruments)
Individuals with poor or no credit history who cannot qualify for traditional loans
Those seeking a short-term bridge loan without credit reporting or collection risk
People looking to sell gold or precious metals for cash quickly
diagnosis: FirstCash is best for consumers with immediate short-term cash needs who own valuable collateral and lack access to traditional credit. The primary caveat is that pawn loans are expensive, non-credit-building borrowing options that carry risk of losing personal property—they provide rapid liquidity but not financial improvement or long-term solutions.
services: Pawn loans secured by personal property
Retail merchandise sales (jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, instruments)
Quick cash transactions on the spot
Retail finance payment solutions through merchant partners
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
